habitat: Mediterranean to Central Asia; Chinese G. uralensis also used in TCM.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional demulcent for sore throat and digestive comfort; major TCM formula herb (gan cao).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell reizmildernd bei Halsschmerzen und Verdauung; wichtige TCM-Pflanze (Gancao).
preparation: Decoction, lozenges, extracts; often combined in formulas.
cautions: Can raise blood pressure and lower potassium with prolonged high intake. Avoid excess if hypertensive; drug interactions possible.
historicalNotes: One of the oldest continuously used medicinal roots in Eurasia.
